markets.no_sub_title: At least 7
markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump has taken at least 7 presidential actions from Mar 22, 2026 through Mar 28, 2026 (as checked on the “Presidential Actions” page at whitehouse.gov at 10:00 AM ET on Mar 29, 2026), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The market solely resolves to the publication dates visibly displayed on the home page of the "Presidential Actions" tab at whitehouse.gov at at 10:00 AM ET on Mar 29, 2026. The week runs from Mar 22, 2026 through Mar 28, 2026. The actions may include proclamations, executive orders, nominations & appointments, and memoranda. Any item listed on the page counts, regardless of its legal effect.

Examples (for Jan 10, 2026):

Executive Order with a Jan 7 signing date is released with a Jan 10 publication date → resolves Yes
Proclamation e-mailed to White House Press Pool but not uploaded by 10:00 AM next day → resolves No
Proclamation is released Jan 10 with a backdated Jan 9 publication date → resolves No
Bill signed into law and shows up on "Briefings & Statements" instead of "Presidential Actions" → resolves No
markets.title: Will there be at least 7 presidential actions in the week of Mar 22, 2026?
markets.yes_sub_title: At least 7

markets.no_sub_title: At least 6
markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump has taken at least 6 presidential actions from Mar 22, 2026 through Mar 28, 2026 (as checked on the “Presidential Actions” page at whitehouse.gov at 10:00 AM ET on Mar 29, 2026), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The market solely resolves to the publication dates visibly displayed on the home page of the "Presidential Actions" tab at whitehouse.gov at at 10:00 AM ET on Mar 29, 2026. The week runs from Mar 22, 2026 through Mar 28, 2026. The actions may include proclamations, executive orders, nominations & appointments, and memoranda. Any item listed on the page counts, regardless of its legal effect.

Examples (for Jan 10, 2026):

Executive Order with a Jan 7 signing date is released with a Jan 10 publication date → resolves Yes
Proclamation e-mailed to White House Press Pool but not uploaded by 10:00 AM next day → resolves No

markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump has taken at least 5 presidential actions from Mar 22, 2026 through Mar 28, 2026 (as checked on the “Presidential Actions” page at whitehouse.gov at 10:00 AM ET on Mar 29, 2026), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The market solely resolves to the publication dates visibly displayed on the home page of the "Presidential Actions" tab at whitehouse.gov at at 10:00 AM ET on Mar 29, 2026. The week runs from Mar 22, 2026 through Mar 28, 2026. The actions may include proclamations, executive orders, nominations & appointments, and memoranda. Any item listed on the page counts, regardless of its legal effect.
